tools.name: get_classes
tools.description: Use this when a user wants to learn, practice, or develop a creative skill and relevant Skillshare classes may help. Search Skillshare’s catalog for classes in areas like drawing, illustration, painting, digital art, Procreate, animation, design, photography, and related creative hobbies. Also use this for broad creative-growth requests like “I want to develop some creative skills” or “I want a creative hobby.” Apply filters only when the user explicitly asks for them, such as “beginner only” or “under 30 minutes.” Do not apply filters by default.
